issues: pause button slightly wide for a HUD corner element; at displayed resolution it reads closer to a label bar than a discrete icon
no clear isolation of the pause button asset itself — it blends with the HUD strip making true pixel dimensions hard to confirm against ≤24x24 icon guideline
reasoning: The pause button (暂停) sits in the top-right HUD bar at a compact but text-heavy size, consistent with the other interactive buttons (召唤, 攻击) in the scene. It does not overwhelm the gameplay area and maintains the toy-diorama feel — the world tiles and entities are clearly primary, with UI framing the edges. However, for a 'button' category asset evaluated against HUD icon rules (≤24x24), the element skews toward a wide rectangular label rather than a tight icon, which is only marginal for the category. No perspective mismatch, no scene overwhelm, no player-size violation. Overall composition is clean; the sole concern is the button being wider than a strict icon budget would allow.
